sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39510" key="e)piqwraki/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιθωρᾱκ-ίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n39510.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">put on one's armour</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">θωρακ-</ref> </xr> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
